hero.subtitle: Craft the perfect deck for every faction

about.title: About Gwent Forge
about.intro: Gwent Forge is a fan-made web application designed to help players build, manage, and organize decks for Gwent: The Legendary Card Game before game night begins.

why.title: Why Gwent Forge Exists
why.paragraph1: Building decks during a game session can take valuable time away from actually playing. Gwent Forge was created to solve that problem by allowing players to prepare their decks in advance.
why.paragraph2: Whether you are testing new strategies, organizing multiple faction builds, or simply arriving ready to play, the goal is to make deck preparation fast, intuitive, and enjoyable.

about.features_subtitle: Tools focused on preparation, organization, and faster gameplay.

deck_management.title: Deck Management
deck_management.description: Create, edit, and organize multiple deck configurations for every faction.

card_browser.title: Card Browser
card_browser.description: Browse cards, abilities, ranges, and factions with fast filtering and search.

localization.title: Localization
localization.description: Use the application in multiple languages with translated interface and game data.

game_night.title: Game Night Ready
game_night.description: Prepare decks before the session so you can spend more time playing and less time setting up.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.paragraph1: Gwent Forge is an unofficial fan-made project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or approved by CD PROJEKT S.A., CD PROJEKT RED, No Loading Games, or any of their affiliates.
disclaimer.paragraph2: Gwent, The Witcher, associated names, characters, artwork, and related intellectual property are trademarks and copyrighted properties of their respective owners.
disclaimer.paragraph3: This project is created for educational, personal, and community purposes only.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Have a question, an idea for a new feature, or found a bug? We would love to hear from you. Gwent Forge grows with the help of the community, and every suggestion helps make the application better for players.

github.title: GitHub Project
github.subtitle: The preferred way to contact.
github.note: For bug reports, feature requests, suggestions, or general feedback, please use the GitHub repository. This helps keep discussions public, organized, and accessible to the community.

contact.topics_subtitle: The most common reasons to contact.

suggestions.title: Ideas & Features
suggestions.description: Share proposals for new features, interface improvements, or tools that could help the Gwent community.

bugs.title: Bugs & Issues
bugs.description: Report application problems, card data issues, filter or translation errors, and performance-related bugs.

feedback.title: Project Feedback
feedback.description: Tell us what works well, what could be improved, and how your experience with Gwent Forge can be made even better.

community.title: Built with the Community
community.description: Gwent Forge is developed as a fan-made project for Gwent players. Every message, suggestion, and bug report helps improve the application and deliver better tools for deck preparation and organization.
community.footer: Thank you for supporting the project

footer.description_1: Gwent Forge is an unofficial fan work and is not approved/endorsed by CD PROJEKT RED.
footer.description_2: Gwent and The Witcher are trademarks and copyrighted properties of their respective owners.
